mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_daily_summary ( employee_id, work_date, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, work_hours, status, calculation_version, calculated_at ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{workDate}, #{clockInTime}, #{clockOutTime}, #{workHours}, #{status}, #{calculationVersion}, #{calculatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE clock_in_time = VALUES(clock_in_time), clock_out_time = VALUES(clock_out_time), work_hours = VALUES(work_hours), status = VALUES(status), calculation_version = VALUES(calculation_version), calculated_at = VALUES(calculated_at), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, work_date, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, work_hours, status, calculation_version, calculated_at, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_daily_summary WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND work_date = #{workDate}
